attestation_note: Three extraction errors corrected: normalized inconsistent date formats, removed unsupported inferred leadership language, and kept STEM eligibility out of the resume record until separately verified.

records.text: Software engineer with 1.5 years of experience building REST APIs, full-stack web applications, data engineering workflows, and LLM/RAG systems.

records.title: Data Engineering Volunteer
verified_details: Built a multi-model AI platform where 100+ faculty could query and compare six AI assistants running on different LLMs side by side.
Engineered parallel LLM execution with Node.js and Promise.all, reducing panel-mode response time from 18 seconds to 3 seconds.
Created a RESTful Express routing layer with JWT authentication to normalize inconsistent responses from six assistant APIs into one predictable schema.
Containerized the application with Docker and automated CI/CD through GitHub Actions.
Supported Supabase row-level security and structured logging for production release workflows.

records.title: Software Development Engineer
verified_details: Designed an inventory REST API with Spring Boot and MySQL for real-time stock tracking, barcode lookup, and automated low-stock alerts.
Developed a customer order-tracking module with Spring Boot, Hibernate ORM, and Redis.
Reduced order-retrieval time by 40 percent on a dataset of 500+ orders.
Secured 10+ ERP microservices with Spring Security, JWT authentication, role-based access control, request validation, and per-endpoint rate limiting.
Automated unit and integration tests for critical service paths.
Maintained technical documentation in an Agile/Scrum process using Git.

records.name: Eventopia
verified_details: Built a full-stack event marketplace with ticket checkout and organizer event management.
Implemented an idempotent Stripe payment flow using webhook verification and unique transaction IDs to prevent duplicate charges.
Optimized event-listing path by parallelizing queries, removing redundant aggregation, adding caching, and creating a covering index.
Reduced p95 latency from 3.7 seconds to 1.2 seconds.
Increased throughput to nearly 99 requests per second at 200 concurrent users under k6 load testing.

records.name: Document Parser
verified_details: Engineered a RAG pipeline for document-grounded Q&A over PDF and TXT files.
Implemented hybrid semantic and keyword retrieval, reranking, and a confidence gate for low-evidence queries.
Built an automated LLM-as-judge evaluation harness with 74 pytest tests in CI.
Reduced hallucinated answers from 39 percent to 33 percent against a no-retrieval baseline across 18 cases.

records.name: Advanced Certification in Data Science and AI
